creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Miroslav Lachman from comment #0)

Thanks for the hint, I had been working on an update to 0.14.x in 2023Q2, but in the course of May the releases 0.15.x and 1.x appeared in rather short intervals, so that I put the project aside for the time being.

It seems that the 1.x releases series seems to be quite stable now, so I can resume my work in the near future, unless someone is faster and has a usable patch.

At this time of writing there also at least two ports that needs to be patched to relax the version requirements before devel/py-maturin 1.1.x can land:

- devel/py-jellyfish (= devel/py-maturin >=0.13<15 in BUILD_DEPENDS)
- devel/py-watchfiles (= devel/py-maturin >=0.13<15 in BUILD_DEPENDS)
